calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Tina Naicker of Bryan Cave LLP (415-675-3400) appearing for defendant Washington Mutual Inc. opposing party. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHANNON's Motion For Reconsideration is Denied. 1) Bankruptcy filing was in existence at time of original hearing; 2) Plaintiff's reorganization plan of 12/21/12 should have included bond amount per this Court's order of 11/13/12 so Bankruptcy Court can exercise judicial comity. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

Notice And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp 473
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Nia Woolliscroft-Hildreth of Attorney at Law (408-879-2642) appearing for plaintiff Michael John Shannon moving party.
Atty. Tina Naichen of Bryan Cave (415-675-3400) appearing for defendants opposing party.

Argued, the tentative ruling is adopted, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHANNON's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp 473 is GRANTED. Plaintiff met the requirements for discretionary relief per CCP 473(b). Plaintiff to be deposited $895.00 attorney's fees and costs with court. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Kay Tsenin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (KS/501)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Nia Woolliscroft-Hildreth of Attorney at Law (408-879-2642) appearing for plaintiff Michael John Shannon moving party.

Argued, the tentative ruling is adopted, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHANNON'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff has 10 days to file his second amended complaint. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Kay Tsenin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. KS/501)
